code: import React from'react';import{Link,useLocation}from'react-router-dom';import'./Navbar.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Navbar=()=>{const location=useLocation();const navItems=[{path:'/dashboard',label:'Dashboard',icon:'📊'},{path:'/strategies',label:'Strategies',icon:'👑'},{path:'/analytics',label:'Analytics',icon:'📈'},{path:'/settings',label:'Settings',icon:'⚙️'},{path:'/mt5',label:'MT5',icon:'🤖'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("nav",{className:"navbar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"nav-brand",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h2",{children:["KXNG",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"TRADER"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"nav-links",children:navItems.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:item.path,className:`nav-link ${location.pathname===item.path?'active':''}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"nav-icon",children:item.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:item.label})]},item.path))})]});};export default Navbar;
